content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market positive — Nifty +0.21%, Bank Nifty +0.75%, Pharma +1.53%, PSU Banks +0.96%, Realty +1.00%. VIX softening (-2.23%). Earnings season delivering strong prints (M&M, COFORGE, NAVINFLUOR, BANDHANBNK, SOBHA, ABCAPITAL all beat). Heavy book deployed at 65%; focus is position management and selective trailing rather than aggressive new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD with current SL 1035 (already at breakeven+5%, ~1.7% below CMP 1053 — meets 1% trail-gap floor). +6.3% unrealized; thesis intact (Q4 beat, sub-1% GNPA, HFC sector tailwind). No-op MODIFY effectively — keeping HOLD. Switching to HOLD action."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 sits 1.7% below CMP 1053, comfortable trail. Target 1110 still 5.4% upside. Thesis intact: Q4 PAT +19% YoY, sub-1% GNPA, HFC rate-cut tailwind. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge at -1.1%. SL 119 (-3.8% below CMP 123.80) intact. Gold consolidating after correction; medium-term constructive. Hold as portfolio diversifier."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at 52w high 1748.60 then faded to 1729 (-0.78% today). SL 1715 is 0.8% below CMP — slightly tight but warranted given promoter 2% stake sale overhang and at-ATH momentum risk. Trimming target from 1800 to 1780 (R:R from 1715 SL: reward 51 vs risk 14 = 3.6x — well above min). Lock in tighter risk into the overhang."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround thesis intact (PAT +68%, GNPA -140bps, NIM 6.2%). At -0.9% post +12% surge — normal consolidation. SL 206 holds 0.8% below CMP 207.68. Hold; consider trail to entry if it pushes through 212."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% on the day with strong push to 4668. SL still at entry 4575 (1.8% below CMP) is appropriate trail-gap. No change — emit HOLD instead. Switching."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defence rally intact (+2.13% today, +31% in a month). SL at breakeven 4575, target 4875 (+4.6% upside). Q4 results expected mid-May — keep position, do NOT add. If gain extends to +4%, will trail SL up next tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (PAT +124.8%, presales +30%, net-debt negative) but stock fading after Day-1 pop — at -2.8%. SL 1420 (-1.2% below CMP 1436.80) is the floor; if it triggers, exit cleanly. Thesis intact, give it room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stellar Q4 (PAT +124%, EBITDA margin +875bps to 34.2%), promoter pledge fully released. +2.1% unrealized. SL 6950 is 1.4% below CMP 7052 — meets trail-gap. Target 7400 (+4.9%). No change values — switch to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Best fundamental setup in book. SL 6950 at breakeven+0.7%, 1.4% below CMP — adequate trail. Geojit target 8500 supports continued upside. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock surged +8.4% to 834.10 on Jefferies Buy initiation. Position essentially flat (-0.5%) after entry. SL 820 holds 1.7% below CMP. Thesis (metro/Vande Bharat orderbook) intact — hold; consider trail to 830 next tick if breakout sustains above 850."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (+31% PAT, AUM +16%, NBFC disbursements +28%). At -0.2% but stock made fresh 52w high 369.30 today (+6.78%). SL 358 (-3.1% below CMP) — give room post-results. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.14% post-results, made new 52w high 843.15 then faded. Margin compression concerns (-115bps EBITDA) is the overhang. SL 805 (2.4% below CMP). Hold; if it can't reclaim 830, will tighten."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Record FY26 PAT +35%, top Nifty gainer +5.52% today. At -0.7% (entered near intraday top). SL 3245 (1% below CMP 3278) — borderline tight; keep as is for now since the day is still bullish. Auto cycle + dividend Rs 33 announced. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Massive Q4 beat (revenue +30%, PAT +91% FY26), gapped +10%. +1.0% unrealized. SL 1215 (-4.1% below CMP 1267.90) gives room for post-gap consolidation. Cigniti merger effective. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 at 1.7% below CMP — appropriate trail. Will move to 1050 (lock +6.7%) if stock pushes past 1080."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL 119 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening target to 1780 (from 1800) given ATH momentum + promoter sale overhang. SL already at 1715 — locks +0.9%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 206 holds. Will trail to 209 (entry) on push above 212."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 4575. Q4 results mid-May — binary watch but currently sized OK; will reassess 3 sessions before announcement."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Worst performer at -2.8%; SL 1420 only 1.2% below CMP. Let it work or stop out — no MODIFY churn."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong fundamentals + clean technicals. SL 6950 (1.4% below CMP) — adequate trail. Will lift to 7000 above 7150."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Big move +8.4% but SL 820 holds. Watch for hold above 830 to trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high; SL 358 at -3.1% gives breakout room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Margin overhang vs. Q4 revenue beat — let SL 805 manage downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Record results; entered near top so SL 3245 needs to hold. Watch close — 1% gap is the floor I won't tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Post-gap consolidation expected; SL 1215 gives 4% room."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HFCL pending BUY at 133.50 placed 385m ago — still OPEN. Sector still positive but stock not at the limit; let it expire if no fill by 2:30 PM (MIS deadline). Watching CAMS, GRSE, VEDL, AUROPHARMA, BIOCON, PNB, SRF for tomorrow if today's momentum cleans up. LALPATHLAB's 11.4x volume + price pop is interesting but already up 15%+ in 2 sessions — better to wait for a pullback than chase.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed across 12 names — well-diversified across HFC, gold, ports, banking, defence, realty, chemicals, capital goods, NBFC, FMCG, auto, IT. No single sector >20%. Day P&L +0.35% with 8/12 positions green. Strategy: manage existing book through earnings season; do NOT add new positions today given (a) heavy deployment, (b) several positions at fresh highs needing trail discipline, (c) HAL has Q4 results mid-May binary risk to monitor. Cancelling pending HFCL order will be considered at 2:30 PM cutoff if unfilled."
}
